description: Sprint velocity is below planned, milestone delayed by 7 days due to resource leave, skill gap (no SME for Third-party Payer API), and external API response delays.
mitigation: Re-prioritize backlog, secure SME support, and engage API vendor for SLA improvement.

description: Critical defects (Sev 1: Incorrect payment calculation, Sev 2: Eligibility validation issues) trending up 20%, concentrated in Third-party Integration module, with defect leakage to UAT.
mitigation: Initiate root cause analysis, strengthen QA coverage, and focus testing on integration module.

description: External dependency on Third-party Payer API causing response delays and inconsistent data; internal dependencies include infra team (frequent downtime) and business clarification pending for payment rules.
mitigation: Escalate to API provider, improve infra stability, and expedite business rule clarification.

description: Batch jobs failing intermittently during night runs, manual intervention required for claim reprocessing, and test environment delays impacting timely QA.
mitigation: Automate batch monitoring, implement retry logic, and improve test environment provisioning.

description: HIPAA compliance validation pending for new API and incomplete data masking in lower environments may lead to regulatory exposure.
mitigation: Complete HIPAA validation and data masking before production release.
